title: SWD Cricket: Promotion, reserve and women's league results
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"In the Women’s Division 1 Pacaltsdorp United defeated George by six wickets and Sussex won by 10 wickets against Knysna Cavaliers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS  - Pirates United remained on the top of the table of the SWD Cricket promotion league after a 153-run bonus point victory against Ramblers on Saturday 24 January.","html":"CRICKET NEWS - Pirates United remained on the top of the table of the SWD Cricket promotion league after a 153-run bonus point victory against Ramblers on Saturday 24 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There were also victories for Ladismith (beat Heidelberg United by eight wickets) and George B (beat Riversdale by one wicket)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Women’s Division 1 Pacaltsdorp United defeated George by six wickets and Sussex won by 10 wickets against Knysna Cavaliers.","html":"In the Women’s Division 1 Pacaltsdorp United defeated George by six wickets and Sussex won by 10 wickets against Knysna Cavaliers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised score cards for the weekend are:","html":"The summarised score cards for the weekend are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Promotion league","html":"Promotion league"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pirates United beat Ramblers with 153 runs:","html":"Pirates United beat Ramblers with 153 runs:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pirates United 278/4 (50 overs); Ramblers 125 all out (27.5 overs)","html":"Pirates United 278/4 (50 overs); Ramblers 125 all out (27.5 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ladismith beat Heidelberg United by eight wickets:","html":"Ladismith beat Heidelberg United by eight wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heidelberg United 143 all out (21.1 overs); Ladismith 144/2 (16 overs)","html":"Heidelberg United 143 all out (21.1 overs); Ladismith 144/2 (16 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George B beat Riversdale by one wicket:","html":"George B beat Riversdale by one wicket:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Riversdale 160 all out (26.3 overs); George B 161/9 (37.5 overs)","html":"Riversdale 160 all out (26.3 overs); George B 161/9 (37.5 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve division 1","html":"Reserve division 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bongolethu beat Union Stars B by five wickets:","html":"Bongolethu beat Union Stars B by five wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars B 84 all out (33 overs); Bongolethu 85/5 (18.3 overs)","html":"Union Stars B 84 all out (33 overs); Bongolethu 85/5 (18.3 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beaufort West A beat Harlequins Forces C by three wickets:","html":"Beaufort West A beat Harlequins Forces C by three wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Harlequin’s Forces C 91 all out (21.5 overs); Beaufort West A 95/7","html":"Harlequin’s Forces C 91 all out (21.5 overs); Beaufort West A 95/7"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Hope beat Kwanonqaba by 10 wickets:","html":"Western Hope beat Kwanonqaba by 10 wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kwanonqaba 133 all out (29.3 overs); Western Hope 137/0 (15.5 overs)","html":"Kwanonqaba 133 all out (29.3 overs); Western Hope 137/0 (15.5 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos beat Melkhoutfontein by two wickets:","html":"Hartenbos beat Melkhoutfontein by two wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Melkhoutfontein 137 all out (28.4 overs); Hartenbos 139/8 (24.3 overs)","html":"Melkhoutfontein 137 all out (28.4 overs); Hartenbos 139/8 (24.3 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve division 2","html":"Reserve division 2"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Calitzdorp Young Stars A beat Harlequins Forces B with 332 runs:","html":"Calitzdorp Young Stars A beat Harlequins Forces B with 332 runs:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Calitzdorp Young Stars A 374 all out (37.5 overs); Harlequins Forces B 42 all out (19 overs)","html":"Calitzdorp Young Stars A 374 all out (37.5 overs); Harlequins Forces B 42 all out (19 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramblers B beat Hartenbos B with 74 runs:","html":"Ramblers B beat Hartenbos B with 74 runs:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramblers B 273 all out (38.5 overs); Hartenbos B 199 all out (37.1 overs)","html":"Ramblers B 273 all out (38.5 overs); Hartenbos B 199 all out (37.1 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex B beat Mossel Bay B by three wickets:","html":"Sussex B beat Mossel Bay B by three wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay B 179/9 (40 overs); Sussex B 181/7 (23.3 overs)","html":"Mossel Bay B 179/9 (40 overs); Sussex B 181/7 (23.3 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers C beat Plett Pioneers C by nine wickets:","html":"Knysna Cavaliers C beat Plett Pioneers C by nine wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers C 69 all out (18.3 overs); Knysna Cavaliers C 70/1 (14.4 overs)","html":"Plett Pioneers C 69 all out (18.3 overs); Knysna Cavaliers C 70/1 (14.4 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers B beat Pirates United B with 82 runs:","html":"Knysna Cavaliers B beat Pirates United B with 82 runs:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers B 258/8 (40 overs); Pirates United B 176/6 (40 overs)","html":"Knysna Cavaliers B 258/8 (40 overs); Pirates United B 176/6 (40 overs)"}]
